note: Refusal-AUC over a hand-labeled panel of known-provenance claim-sets (flf-contest#6). Abstention scored as discrimination, not as a rate. Score = shared-upstream count; AUC = P(entangled > disjoint), ties 0.5. Recompute with fixtures/refusal_auc.py.

cases.ground_truth: one paper (Worobey 2022); two of three also share the PRC early-case investigation
